basic_info.short_form: GMERS Medical College And Hospital Patan

address.address: E-2, Dean Bungalow, Dharpur Village India
address.map_location: GMERS Medical College And Hospital Patan, Patan

pos_sentences: Campus life is very easy and enjoyable because many fests and programs are held most every month like celebrations of every festival, and other programs.
The rooms are provided with amenities like proper lights, good furniture, and a good view.
Our college is the perfect place to study and a very good surrounding environment to leave pure and natural air available.
neg_sentences: We have a mess below our hostel and the quality of food is not good and the mess fees are around 2300/month.
The exam was taken every 6 months and the exam of the course is very difficult as such that students go into depressed at the time of the exam no one goes to sleep because of exam fear.
Mess are provided in the campus but the food quality is horrible.
